title: geraniospermum hispidum
intro: Geraniospermum hispidum, also known as the hairy geraniospermum, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Geraniospermum hispidum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an anti-allergic agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
